description: Source file size policy for Semiotic. New or growing files must stay under the hard limits. Existing oversized files are listed with a ratchet ceiling (maxLines). Prefer splitting modules over raising maxLines.

allowlist.reason: Cohesive public React orchestrator for the controlled Crucible runtime: imperative replay, reduced-motion/snapshot handling, semantic playback, physics reconciliation, and frame wiring share one state boundary. Keep the public component together; do not grow past this reviewed ceiling.

Atomic transactional reducer for the authored Crucible event grammar. Every effect shares rollback, diagnostics, provenance, conservation, and materialization state; splitting individual effect branches would obscure those invariants. Do not grow past this reviewed ceiling.

Deterministic Crucible compiler/runtime core. Initial-state accessors, phase/event validation, layout apertures, seeded bodies, and replay must agree on the same semantic identity and are intentionally reviewed as one deterministic program. Do not grow past this reviewed ceiling.

Single registry object for the physics family. Keeping the seven chart contracts adjacent makes completeness and generated schema review straightforward; the Crucible wire-schema is already factored into its own module. Do not grow past this reviewed ceiling.

Cached Net Ensemble geometry and scene emission share one layout contract. Presentation overlays have been extracted; retain the remaining cache-to-scene flow together rather than splitting its internal geometry types across modules. Do not grow past this reviewed ceiling.
Deliberately flat public AI entry-point barrel. It is one line above the hard limit and splitting exports would make import discovery less useful; do not grow past this reviewed ceiling.
Grandfathered production file above hard limit (800). Split on meaningful touch; do not grow past maxLines.

Cohesive layered chart-description and communicative-act engine. The recent capability/physics grounding work keeps its rule ordering and shared diagnostic vocabulary in one reviewable pass; do not grow past this reviewed ceiling.

Split on meaningful touch; do not grow past maxLines. +67 (2026-07-11): line-object input now stamps a synthetic series-identity field onto flattened points so string/function lineBy and default per-line grouping all survive coordinate flattening. +21 (2026-07-15): styleRules prop + memoized XY rule-context wired into useXYLineStyle for cross-family threshold styling. +13 (2026-07-17): minor follow-on touch, ceiling ratcheted to match — split plan unchanged: extract the forecast/anomaly segment-aware lazy-load block + direct-label layout into hooks (useLineForecastStyle / useLineDirectLabels) to drop back under 800. +1 (2026-07-23): passes hasTitle to useChartLegendAndMargin so a top legend reserves space below the chart title.
